name: pnp-sp-dev-spfx-web-parts-react-team-randomiser
title: Team Randomiser
shortDescription: Randomly assign people into evenly-sized groups with a single click. Enter a list of names and a desired group size; the web part shuffles them and displays colour-coded group cards. Hit Shuffle Groups to re-randomise at any time.
longDescription: Randomly assign people into evenly-sized groups with a single click. Enter a list of names and a desired group size; the web part shuffles them and displays colour-coded group cards. Hit Shuffle Groups to re-randomise at any time.

references.name: Build your first SharePoint client-side web part
references.description: Client-side web parts are client-side components that run in the context of a SharePoint page. Client-side web parts can be deployed to SharePoint environments that support the SharePoint Framework. You can also use modern JavaScript web frameworks, tools, and libraries to build them.
